description: Natural Selection is a technology startup that focuses on AI-powered intelligent companions.
unique_findings: The GitHub profile for 'natural-selection' shows zero public repositories and no description, which is highly unusual for a venture-backed AI company. This could signal a stealth mode approach or a reliance on proprietary, closed-source technology.

Despite raising $42,000,000 in venture funding, there is no technical footprint or open-source engagement visible. This suggests either an extreme focus on IP protection or that the technical implementation is entirely internal and not community-driven, which is rare among AI startups aiming for ecosystem effects.

story_angles.headline: Why Natural Selection Raised $42M With Zero Public Code: Betting on Stealth in AI
